title: aristida brevisubulata
intro: Aristida brevisubulata, also known as blue bluestem, is a species of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Aristida brevisubulata include treating various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions for medicinal purposes, and it is also used in traditional remedies in some parts of the world.
